justification: The question concerns the future stock price performance of a specific publicly traded company (WBD) and uses financial market data for resolution.
question:
Will WBD's market close price on each resolution date listed below be higher than its market close price on 2026-01-18?

Stock splits and reverse splits will be accounted for in resolving this question. Forecasts on questions about companies that have been delisted (through mergers or bankruptcy) will resolve to their final close price.
